claims.headline: Practices Pvolve low-impact resistance training as her primary fitness method
claims.body: Aniston has partnered with Pvolve since 2023 and credits the resistance-based, low-impact program with making her feel stronger than ever before. She trains with the system up to three times a week and travels with the P.band and P.ball for full-body workouts on the road.

sources.excerpt: Stronger than I have ever felt before. Jen loves a challenge — when she is not traveling, they train together up to three times a week.
Jennifer Aniston talks to InStyle about fitness tips, working out, and her new partnership with Pvolve.

claims.headline: Starts the morning with Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides as a daily ritual
claims.body: Aniston joined Vital Proteins as Chief Creative Officer in 2020 and has spoken in interviews about taking the unflavored Collagen Peptides powder mixed into her morning shake or coffee.

sources.excerpt: The Morning Show star will also serve as the chief creative officer of the collagen brand.
I make my shake in the morning and I use the Collagen Peptide powder, the chocolate.

claims.headline: Follows an 80/20 balanced eating approach with consistent nutrition
claims.body: Aniston describes her everyday diet as roughly 80 percent healthy, balanced meals and 20 percent flexibility for indulgences. She emphasizes consistency over restriction and gives herself a cheat day rather than restarting cycles.

sources.excerpt: My nutrition is very much the same. I always give myself a cheat day.
She describes her approach as an 80/20 plan — meaning, 80% of the time, she eats healthy, balanced meals.

claims.headline: Founded LolaVie, a clean hair-care line launched in September 2021
claims.body: Aniston launched LolaVie in September 2021 with the Glossing Detangler, a $25 protective and conditioning product. The brand has since expanded to shampoos, conditioners, and leave-in treatments distributed through Ulta Beauty.

sources.excerpt: LolaVie debuts on September 8, 2021. The brand's first product, the Glossing Detangler, retails for $25 and softens hair with protective and conditioning ingredients.
Her hair-care line, LolaVie, has launched three do-it-all products since debuting a year ago and is about to launch two more.

claims.headline: Credits water, SPF, and sleep as the foundation of her skincare routine
claims.body: Aniston has consistently named hydration, daily sun protection, and good sleep as the non-negotiables of her skincare approach. She supplements with simple at-home tools such as an infrared sauna and gentle nanocurrent devices, and has moved away from aggressive treatments over time.

sources.excerpt: Water, SPF and lots of sleep are truly key to healthy skin as you get older.
It was way too aggressive and that is when I realized that what might work in the short term can be damaging in the long run.
